episodes.title: (A) Aum Shinrikyo (1998)
episodes.description: (A) Aum Shinrikyo, japansk dokumentär av Tatsuya Mori med engelsk undertext.These words, in Sanskrit, are expressed in one word, Aum. Aum symbolizes the heartlessness of the universe which lies at the essence of absolute truth. And together with our pursuit for Truth (=Shinri),  Aum Shinrikyo was derived from these two meanings. Well now, if you're in doubt of your existence, why don't you knock at the gate of Aum Shinrikyo. (Shoko Asahara)Del 2: https://youtu.be/b34XGG2k8_g
